task.title: Gate completed startup storage migrations
task.classification: storage startup migration performance and compatibility

coreClaim: Legacy full-collection startup migration passes record versioned completion after a successful first run and are skipped on later startups for the same normalized data directory.
rootCause: AppState construction called several broad legacy storage migrations unconditionally after default seeding, so already-normalized data directories could rescan large collections on every launch.

inScope: AppState startup migration sequencing in src-tauri/src/state.rs
Versioned completion markers for legacy full-collection passes
Focused proof for first-run marking, second-run skip, and failed-run retry behavior
outOfScope: Changing UI startup or shell rendering

claimBoundary.coreClaim: Legacy full-collection startup migration passes are gated by versioned completion keys after one successful run per data directory.
claimBoundary.riskType: storage migration legacy compatibility user-data startup performance
currentPathsOrFormats: gallery and managed media reference collections
legacyPathsOrFormats: characters with string or missing data fields repaired by migrate_storage_json_fields
messages with embedded swipes compacted into message-swipes sidecars
agent-runs with legacy row shapes normalized from agent configs
chats with legacy ungrouped root groupId state
local media references and inline image data URLs copied into managed storage
legacy chat gallery files under gallery/<chatId>/
outOfScopeClaims: This PR does not prove startup timing on a seeded large production data directory.
This PR does not change import paths; newly imported rows must still be normalized by their import/write owner paths.
This PR does not gate default data seeding or FileStorage load-time corrupt-file recovery.

contractLaneGate.brokenContract: The Rust storage startup path treated completed one-time legacy migrations as always-on repair work.
contractLaneGate.consumer: De-Koi desktop and hostable runtime startup using FileStorage data directories
contractLaneGate.impliedContract: Legacy data normalization should run until a data directory has been successfully normalized, then avoid broad repeated scans on later startups.
contractLaneGate.actualEnforcement: run_startup_migration_once checks app-settings/startup-migrations for a versioned key, runs the migration only when the key is absent, and writes the key only after the migration returns Ok.
contractLaneGate.primaryOwnerDetail: Rust storage owns local FileStorage startup migrations and app data repair mechanics.
contractLaneGate.wrongLaneFixToAvoid: Do not hide repeated startup scans with UI loading copy or shell throttling; the storage startup owner must decide which legacy passes are completed for the data directory.

positiveRows.claim: A completed startup migration records its versioned key and skips later runs.
positiveRows.evidence: startup_migration_once_marks_completion_and_skips_later_runs passed in cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml startup_migration_once --lib.

positiveRows.claim: A failed startup migration is not marked complete and can retry later.
positiveRows.evidence: startup_migration_once_does_not_mark_failed_runs passed in cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml startup_migration_once --lib.

positiveRows.claim: Legacy first-run AppState startup migrations still normalize existing fixture rows.
positiveRows.evidence: cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml app_state_startup --lib passed 16 tests covering snapshot stats, media references, inline image references, legacy gallery recovery, chat root grouping, and message prompt snapshot compaction.

positiveRows.claim: The PR preserves De-Koi architecture and baseline gates.
positiveRows.evidence: pnpm check passed, including line endings, scratch, architecture, storage contracts, frontend typecheck, Rust check, docs, discovery, agent workflow, launcher safety, and warning-only unused-code reporting.

contradictionRows.claim: Failed migrations must not produce fake success markers.
contradictionRows.evidence: startup_migration_once_does_not_mark_failed_runs asserts startup_migration_applied remains false after an AppError and that a later successful run executes once and marks the key.

contradictionRows.claim: Always-on startup work should not be accidentally gated.
contradictionRows.evidence: The startup sequence leaves seed_defaults before the gated block and documents that default seeding and FileStorage load-time recovery remain always-on.

contradictionRows.claim: The fix should not expand UI, shared API, HTTP dispatch, or import/export behavior.
contradictionRows.evidence: The code diff is limited to src-tauri/src/state.rs plus this proof ledger; no UI, TypeScript runtime wrapper, HTTP dispatch, or import/export module changed.

legacyDefaultRows.claim: Existing legacy rows are still repaired on the first startup before completion is marked.
legacyDefaultRows.evidence: app_state_startup tests passed after the gating change and exercise the legacy storage shapes listed in the issue.

legacyDefaultRows.claim: Already-normalized data directories preserve startup behavior without repeated full scans.
legacyDefaultRows.evidence: run_startup_migration_once skips invoking the provided migration closure when startup_migration_applied returns true.

legacyDefaultRows.claim: Existing message prompt snapshot marker behavior remains compatible with the shared helper.
legacyDefaultRows.evidence: migrate_message_prompt_snapshots_once now delegates to run_startup_migration_once using the existing messagePromptSnapshotCompactionV1 key, and the existing app_state_startup_compacts_legacy_message_prompt_snapshots_once test still passes.

untestedRows: A large seeded production-scale startup timing comparison was not run in this environment; performance benefit is inferred from skipping migration closures after completion markers.

ownedFacts.description: Startup migration completion markers are stored in FileStorage app-settings/startup-migrations under the value object.
ownedFacts.evidence: src-tauri/src/state.rs startup_migration_flags and mark_startup_migration_applied read and write STARTUP_MIGRATIONS_SETTINGS_ID.

ownedFacts.description: The gated passes are Rust storage startup mechanics, not React UI or TypeScript engine behavior.
ownedFacts.evidence: All production code changes are in src-tauri/src/state.rs AppState initialization.

ownedFacts.description: The focused second-run and failed-run retry behavior is harness-proven with FileStorage temp directories.
ownedFacts.evidence: The new startup_migration_once tests create temporary FileStorage roots and assert marker reads after helper calls.

userActionCopy.description: No manual user action is required by this PR. For optional manual rollback before testing startup migration behavior, copy the De-Koi app data directory to a backup folder outside the app data directory.
userActionCopy.source: De-Koi app data directory before launch, such as the desktop app_data_dir or the data_dir passed to AppState::from_data_dir
userActionCopy.destination: A user-chosen backup folder outside the app data directory, for example <backup>\de-koi-app-data-before-startup-migration
detectedLayouts: legacy inline media values in hot storage rows
legacy chat gallery files under gallery/<chatId>/

manualBlockers.reason: The core correctness claim is marker gating and migration preservation. Timing would quantify the benefit but is not required to prove the behavior.

verification.baselineEvidence: pnpm check exited 0 from the isolated PR worktree after dependencies were installed with pnpm install --frozen-lockfile.

notes: The PR remains draft until proof health, CI, and Bunny gates are clean.
